narratives.Overview: Preset system capturing the entire session: noise color, EQ curve, volumes, enabled meditation sounds with schedules, and break-prompt settings. Ships with sensible defaults; users can save, rename, and delete their own.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Ship default presets (e.g. Deep Work, Wind Down). FR-2: Save, rename, delete, and apply user presets. FR-3: A preset captures noise + EQ + meditation-sound schedules + break settings. NFR-1: Presets persist locally (localStorage) across sessions; no backend. NFR-2: Preset schema is versioned so future fields migrate cleanly.

items.title: Versioned preset schema + local persistence store
